title: Gate 3 Concourse Congestion Surge
description: Turnstile entry rate at Gate 3 exceeded safe flow threshold (380+ fans/min). Bottleneck forming near Concourse C entrance.

title: Medical Emergency near Section 114
description: Fan reported heat exhaustion and dizziness near lower bowl Section 114 concession stand. First aid required immediately.

title: Unauthorized Access Alert at Fan Zone Portal
description: Perimeter optical sensor detected unauthorized door breach near Gate 5 VIP corridor.
